logger.doc:name: Log End S3 Processing
logger.message: ================================================== PROCESSING FINISHED! All S3 files have been validated. You can now stop the Debugger (click the Stop button / red square). ==================================================

logger.doc:name: Log Start List
logger.message: Local Scheduler fetching files from: C:\Users\dnascimento\Desktop\Atrium\twist\Twist_PO_Samples\PO Samples\Regular PO

logger.doc:name: Log End Local Processing
logger.message: ================================================== PROCESSING FINISHED! All local files have been validated. You can now stop the Debugger (click the Stop button / red square). ==================================================

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- payload pluck (value, key) -> { filename: key as String, content: value }

logger.doc:name: Not a ZIP
logger.message: File #[vars.originalFileName] is not a ZIP. Processing directly.

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- [{ filename: vars.originalFileName, content: payload }]

logger.doc:name: Log IDP Success
logger.message: [#[vars.correlationId]] IDP Extraction completed for #[vars.pdfFileName]. Proceeding to Salesforce Validation.

logger.doc:name: Log Low Confidence
logger.message: [#[vars.correlationId]] Confidence Score below 90% (#[payload.confidenceScore]). Routing to exception queue.

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 import * from dw::Runtime output application/java --- wait("delay", 7500)

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var standardBilling = payload.pages[0].fields.parties.billTo.addressBlock.value var promptBilling = payload.prompts.customBillingAddress.answer.value --- { poNumber: (payload.pages[0].fields.purchaseOrderNumber.value default "") replace /[^0-9]/ with "", totalAmount: payload.pages[0].fields.total.value default 0.0, quoteId: payload.pages[0].fields.quoteId.value default "", billingAddress: if (!isEmpty(standardBilling)) standardBilling else (promptBilling default ""), shippingAddress: payload.pages[0].fields.parties.shipTo.addressBlock.value default "", paymentMethod: payload.pages[0].fields.paymentMethod.value default "", confidenceScore: payload.pages[0].fields.purchaseOrderNumber.confidenceScore default 1.0 }

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java var standardBilling = payload.pages[0].fields.parties.billTo.addressBlock.value var promptBilling = payload.prompts.customBillingAddress.answer.value --- { totalAmount: payload.pages[0].fields.total.value default 0.0, billingAddress: if (!isEmpty(standardBilling)) standardBilling else (promptBilling default ""), shippingAddress: payload.pages[0].fields.parties.shipTo.addressBlock.value default "", paymentMethod: payload.pages[0].fields.paymentMethod.value default "" }

salesforce:query.doc:name: Query PurchaseOrder
salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: #["SELECT Id, Purchase_Order_Reference__c, Billing_Address__c, Payment_Billing_Address__c, Starting_PO_Balance__c, Subtotal__c, Type__c, PO_Type__c, Uses_Portal__c, Portal_Name__c, Vat_Exempt__c, Payer__c, Verification_Status__c, Expiration_Date__c, PO_Date__c FROM PurchaseOrder__c WHERE Purchase_Order_Reference__c = '" ++ (payload.poNumber default "") ++ "' LIMIT 200"]

salesforce:query.doc:name: Query Order
salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: #["SELECT Id, Selected_Shipping_Address__r.Street_1__c, Selected_Shipping_Address__r.Street_2__c, Selected_Shipping_Address__r.City__c, Selected_Shipping_Address__r.State__c, Selected_Shipping_Address__r.Zip_Code__c FROM Order WHERE Selected_Payment_Method__c = '" ++ (vars.purchaseOrderData[0].Id default "") ++ "' LIMIT 1"]

logger.doc:name: Log Missing PO
logger.message: [#[vars.correlationId]] PO Number is missing or empty. Skipping SFDC Query and routing to exception.

logger.doc:name: Log Exception Robustly
logger.message: [EXCEPTION-ALERT] CorrelationID: #[vars.correlationId]. Failed to process file: #[vars.originalFileName]. Salesforce was NOT updated. A manual review is required for the data extracted by IDP.

logger.doc:name: SOX Audit Logger
logger.message: [SOX-AUDIT] Event: #[vars.soxEvent default 'Transaction Completed'] | PO Number: #[if(payload is Object) (payload.poNumber default 'N/A') else 'N/A'] | CorrelationID: #[vars.correlationId default ''] | File: #[vars.originalFileName default ''] | Details: #[vars.soxDetails default '']
